decks.notes: This deck focuses on aggressive plays and disrupting your opponents' plans by utilizing a combination of efficient creatures and disruptive spells. By deploying threats like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury, alongside removal spells like Consign to Memory and Prismatic Ending, it aims to apply pressure while disrupting the opponent's board. The inclusion of cards like Ephemerate and Quantum Riddler allows for added versatility and resilience to removal spells. The mana base is designed to support a quick and consistent deployment of threats, ensuring a proactive and disruptive gameplay.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on quickly generating creatures to overwhelm the opponent while utilizing burn spells to control the board. The deck features aggressive creatures like Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury and Ocelot Pride, along with efficient removal spells like Galvanic Discharge and Thraben Charm. Ajani, Nacatl Pariah provides additional support and buffs to the team, while Goblin Bombardment and Ranger-Captain of Eos offer additional options for removal and card advantage. The deck aims to play aggressively and maintain pressure on the opponent to secure a quick victory.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on utilizing cheap and aggressive creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls to quickly apply pressure to the opponent. It also includes burn spells like Galvanic Discharge and Thraben Charm to clear the way for its creatures and finish off the opponent. The deck also has some versatile spells like Voice of Victory and Ranger-Captain of Eos to provide additional utility and flexibility. With a mix of creatures, burn spells, and utility cards, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with its efficient and aggressive gameplay.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on utilizing creatures with haste and burn spells to quickly deal damage to the opponent. The key strategy is to establish early board presence with cards like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury, then use cards like Galvanic Discharge and Thraben Charm to remove blockers and finish off your opponent. The deck also includes powerful planeswalkers like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah to provide additional threats. By combining aggressive creatures and burn spells, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent before they can stabilize.

The main concept of this Dimir Control deck is to disrupt the opponent's game plan while maintaining card advantage and controlling the board through counterspells, removal, and card draw. The deck includes a variety of disruptive spells like Fatal Push, Force of Negation, and Counterspell, as well as creatures like Snapcaster Mage and Orcish Bowmasters. The deck also focuses on graveyard interaction with cards like Cling to Dust and Consult the Star Charts. Overall, the deck aims to outvalue the opponent and win through attrition and control.

This deck focuses on utilizing a combination of aggressive creatures and disruptive spells to control the board and pressure the opponent. By playing efficient threats like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd, as well as disruptive elements like Containment Priest and Quantum Riddler, the deck aims to keep the opponent on the back foot while dealing consistent damage. The inclusion of cards like Solitude and Prismatic Ending allows for removal and protection against opposing threats, ensuring the deck maintains tempo and assert dominance in the match.

The deck focuses on using efficient creatures and spells to disrupt the opponent's game plan while applying pressure with aggressive threats. By combining powerful creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd with removal spells like Solitude and Consign to Memory, the deck aims to control the board and chip away at the opponent's life total. Additionally, the deck includes disruptive elements like Casey Jones, Vigilante and Quantum Riddler to further hinder the opponent's strategy. The mana base is designed to support the deck's aggressive game plan and ensure consistency in casting its spells.

This UW Control deck focuses on maintaining control over the game by utilizing a variety of counterspells, removal spells, and planeswalkers. Using cards like Narset, Parter of Veils and Teferi, Time Raveler, the deck aims to limit the opponent's options while drawing cards and generating advantage. With board wipes like Supreme Verdict and creature removal like Solitude, the deck aims to control the battlefield and eventually win through powerful planeswalkers like Jace, the Mind Sculptor and Teferi, Hero of Dominaria. The deck also utilizes additional win conditions such as Wan Shi Tong, Librarian and Monumental Henge to seal the game.

This Jeskai Control deck focuses on controlling the board through a combination of removal spells and powerful creatures like Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury and Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd. The deck also includes cards like Arena of Glory and Quantum Riddler to disrupt the opponent's strategy and maintain card advantage. With a mix of counterspells, removal, and card draw, this deck aims to outlast the opponent while setting up powerful finishers like Consign to Memory or Fable of the Mirror-Breaker. Additionally, cards like Solitude and Prismatic Ending provide versatile answers to a variety of threats.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on fast, aggressive gameplay with low-cost creatures and burn spells to quickly reduce the opponent's life total. Key cards like Seasoned Pyromancer and Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer help generate card advantage and maintain pressure on the opponent. Ajani, Nacatl Pariah provides both aggression and protection for the team. The deck also includes cards like Goblin Bombardment and Voice of Victory for additional reach and versatility. With a mix of creatures, burn spells, and support cards, this deck aims to finish the game swiftly before the opponent can stabilize.

This deck focuses on quickly building a strong board presence and overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures and powerful spells. By efficiently using mana fixing and card draw, the deck can consistently play threats and disrupt the opponent's game plan. With a mix of efficient creatures, burn spells, and disruptive elements, the deck aims to apply pressure early and maintain control of the game until victory is achieved. Additionally, the inclusion of Leylines and other enchantments provides additional protection and synergy with the deck's strategy.

This deck focuses on controlling the game by disrupting the opponent's resources with cards like Path to Exile, Cleansing Wildfire, and Field of Ruin. It also aims to maintain board control with cards like Wrath of the Skies and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury, while also generating advantage through card draw with Reprieve and White Orchid Phantom. The deck utilizes a mix of removal, counterspells, and land destruction to keep the opponent on the back foot, with the ultimate goal of achieving victory through incremental advantage and outlasting the opponent.

This deck focuses on playing aggressively with creatures like Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury, Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer, Territorial Kavu, and Scion of Draco. The key strategy is to control the board with Leyline Binding and Leyline of the Guildpact, while also using Lightning Bolt and Stubborn Denial to disrupt the opponent's game plan. Consign to Memory provides additional removal and card advantage. The mana base is built around fetching lands with Wooded Foothills, Arid Mesa, and Flooded Strand to ensure consistent color access. Arena of Glory and Doorkeeper Thrull provide additional value and board presence.

The deck focuses on utilizing a tribal theme of humans to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures. By using Aether Vial and Cavern of Souls, the deck can efficiently put creatures onto the battlefield while avoiding counter spells. Thalia's Lieutenant and Adeline, Resplendent Cathar boost the power and toughness of the human creatures, making them even more threatening. Meddling Mage can disrupt the opponent's game plan, while Jirina, Dauntless General provides a pump effect to the team. With support from other cards like Sylvan Safekeeper and Unsettled Mariner, this deck aims to quickly build a board presence and beat down the opponent.

The deck focuses on controlling the opponent's actions through a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and disruptive creatures. It utilizes powerful control elements like Thoughtseize, Counterspell, and Fatal Push to disrupt the opponent's game plan while also utilizing cards like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Quantum Riddler to generate card advantage and maintain control of the game. The deck also includes powerful finishers like Kaito, Bane of Nightmares and Sheoldred's Edict to close out the game once it has gained control. The goal is to outlast the opponent and win through attrition.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on quickly overwhelming opponents with aggressive creatures and burn spells. Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury provide powerful threats, while Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls offer additional aggression. Arena of Glory provides a steady stream of creatures, while Galvanic Discharge and Thraben Charm offer removal options. The deck also includes utility cards like Voice of Victory and Ranger-Captain of Eos to add flexibility. Ultimately, the goal is to outpace opponents and finish them off with a combination of creatures and burn spells.
